title.description: Zita reApp rinoratidzwa musoro. App yekuwana mabikirwo enyika dzose.

subtitle.description: Mutsetse unoratidzwa pasi pezita reapp musoro.

heroTitle.description: Musoro mukuru panguva yepamusoro peji remaoko.

heroSubtitle.text: Tarisa mabikirwo echokwadi kubva kumakicheni enyika dzose
heroSubtitle.description: Mutsetse uri pasi pemusoro mukuru papeji remaoko.

featuredTitle.description: Musoro wechikamu unoratidzwa pamusoro pegridhi yemakadhi emabikirwo.

cookingTime.description: Nguva yekubika inoratidzwa pakadhi rembikirwo. {minutes} inoshandurwa kuti ive nhamba yema miniti.

difficulty.description: Chiratidzo chinoratidzwa pamberi pechikamu chekuoma pakadhi rembikirwo.

easy.description: Chiratidzo chekuoma chinoratidza kuti resipi iri nyore.

medium.description: Chiratidzo chekuoma chinoratidza kuti resipi iri pakati pekuoma.

hard.description: Chiratidzo chekuoma chinoratidza kuti resipi iri yakaoma.
